en_title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 Ports Out Now on PS5, But They Come at a High Price That Fans Were Bracing For
cn_title: 《使命召唤：黑色行动1、2》登陆PS4和PS5，售价高昂
opus_summary: 《使命召唤：黑色行动1》和《黑色行动2》数字版现已登陆PS4和PS5，每款40美元(约合人民币272元)；若加上季票，完整体验总价约140美元(约合人民币952元)(约合人民币272元)。PS Plus会员可享

paragraphs.en: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 are now available on PS4 and PS5, but they won't come cheap.
paragraphs.cn: 《使命召唤：黑色行动1》和《使命召唤：黑色行动2》现已登陆PS4和PS5，但价格并不便宜。

paragraphs.en: Both original Black Ops games have been released digitally on PS4 and PS5 for $40 each. If you want both games and all DLC, the complete experience costs $140. Both games offer a separate season pass priced at $29.99 each.
paragraphs.cn: 两部原版《黑色行动》均以数字版形式登陆PS4和PS5，每款售价40美元(约合人民币272元)。若想购买两款游戏及所有DLC，完整体验总价将达到140美元(约合人民币952元)；两款游戏的独立季票各售29.99美元(约合人民币204元)。

paragraphs.en: PlayStation Plus subscribers get a discount: both games are $20 each and their season passes are $9 each, totaling about $60. This discount runs until August 6.
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation Plus订阅用户可享折扣：两款游戏各20美元(约合人民币136元)，季票各9美元(约合人民币61元)，合计约60美元(约合人民币408元)。优惠持续至8月6日。

paragraphs.en: There is also a free pack for Black Ops 2 with customization packs from the original game. These ports add no new features and have no crossplay. The original servers are in a poor state because of hackers, so a fresh start may be best for everyone.
paragraphs.cn: 《黑色行动2》另有免费包，包含原版可购买的自定义内容。移植版没有新增功能，也不支持跨平台联机。由于原版服务器受黑客影响情况糟糕，重新开始或许反而更适合所有人。

paragraphs.en: CharlieIntel reports that wager matches and theater mode have been removed. Campaign, multiplayer, Zombies, and the emblem editor remain available.
paragraphs.cn: CharlieIntel报道称，赌战模式和剧场模式已被移除。战役、多人模式、僵尸模式以及徽章编辑器仍然保留。
